title: • Players select a faction within our world.
content:
• Players select a faction within our world.
• This does not affect their abilities but determines alliances and rivalries.
• Example Factions:
• The Preservationists – Protect knowledge & tradition.
• The Reformists – Believe in change and literary evolution.
• The Trickster Cult – Seeks disruption & subversion.
• The Archivists – Devoted to maintaining historical records.

✔ 3️⃣ Party (Small-Scale Alliances & Tactical Play)
• Players can form optional parties (2-4 members).
• Parties receive minor buffs for working together.
• Example Buffs:
• Balanced Party (Mix of Archetypes) → +1 Reroll on Random Events.
• Pure Party (Same Archetype Group) → Stronger Buffs But Higher Risks.

✔ 4️⃣ Secret Alignment (Hidden Personal Morality)
• Players will secretly be assigned an internal moral alignment.
• They will not know their alignment, but their actions will shift it over time.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 462 (chunk 462/555)
